rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0010
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—You came.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0020
rows.name:
There is no longer any
meaning to this struggle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0030
rows.name:
And yet you still try
to resist me to the very end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0040
rows.name: You[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0050
rows.name: displease me to no end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0060
rows.name: You will give Al back to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0070
rows.name: Void.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0080
rows.name: Soon, I will complete my escape[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0090
rows.name: and achieve victory.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0100
rows.name: The time you have left is already scarce.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0110
rows.name:
Know that all your
resistance is meaningless[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0120
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—Look.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0130
rows.name:
Little by little, the core
is entering an active state.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0140
rows.name: If the core is the source of Void's power,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0150
rows.name: then when all the cores are activated,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0160
rows.name:
he intends to use that power
to escape this universe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0170
rows.name: Before that happens, we'll rescue the Ares[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0180
rows.name: Rescue Al.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0190
rows.name:
It's our only way to break
through this situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0200
rows.name:
Elma-san, about the
"spear" we activated[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0210
rows.name:
I detected a high-energy
reaction from inside it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0220
rows.name: And the reading is extraordinary![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0230
rows.name:
If we strike it from the outside,
that massive energy should be released[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0240
rows.name: And damage Void?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0250
rows.name: Yes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0260
rows.name:
Even if it doesn't, it should
still suppress Void's power.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0270
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0280
rows.name: You heard her, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0290
rows.name:
If we destroy that "spear," we can
turn the battle in our favor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0300
rows.name: Keep that in mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800120_MSG0310
rows.name: Let's go![ST:wait ]
